name: orabooks-ui
description: OraBooks React UI — builds into ../assets/react for the WordPress plugin

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-react-output.mjs && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config vite.admin.config.ts && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config vite.frontend.config.ts && node scripts/write-deploy-manifest.mjs
